Headline: Delays at Howard Affecting Purple and Yellow Line Service
ShortDescription: Purple and Yellow Line trains are experiencing a delay at Howard : due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. Update to follow.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Purple and Yellow Line trains are experiencing a delay at Howard : due to an unauthorized person on the tracks. 

Personnel are working to restore service/Assistance has been requested and we hope to resume service shortly.

Shuttle buses have been requested to provide connecting service through the affected area. 

Purple Line: Shuttle buses are available from Howard to Linden.

Yellow Line: Shuttle buses have bee requested from Howard to Skokie.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

Updates will be posted as new information becomes available.

Allow extra travel time.
